## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss FOSSA's Package Observer project and potential collaboration with GrowthX for content creation and SEO improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [FOSSA's Package Observer subdomain faced indexing challenges, losing all indexed pages after initial launch](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed a multi-faceted approach: improving Package Observer, enhancing Stack Share, and leveraging cross-linking between properties](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
  - [GrowthX offered a flexible, iterative process starting with audits, strategy, and calibration, followed by rapid content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [FOSSA team expressed interest but needs to balance priorities across multiple properties and ensure alignment with lead generation goals](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

## Topics

### Package Observer Overview

  - [Designed to compete with Snyk Advisor and Sonotype Central](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Provides information on open source packages, licenses, and vulnerabilities](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Built using Python, hosted on PythonAnywhere](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Initially indexed but later de-indexed, possibly due to AI-generated content concerns](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Challenges with getting pages re-indexed despite performance improvements](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Approach

  - [Utilize AI-powered workflows for rapid, high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Implement cross-linking strategy between FOSSA properties (main site, Stack Share, TLDR Legal, Package Observer)](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Focus on improving content quality and user experience before optimizing for conversions](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Suggested link building campaigns to boost authority for the new subdomain](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Recommended balancing efforts across all properties to create a "rising tide" effect](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [GrowthX demonstrated their AI-powered research and content creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Ability to integrate with various data sources and publishing platforms](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Emphasis on fact-checking and ensuring accuracy of generated content](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1976.0)
  - [Flexible approach to adapt to FOSSA's specific needs and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)

### SEO and Indexing Strategies

  - [Importance of building authority for the new subdomain](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
  - [Suggested tactics: internal linking, manual submission to Search Console, bulk indexing tools](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Emphasis on starting small, monitoring indexing and impressions before scaling up](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

### Collaboration Structure

  - [GrowthX offered a pilot period starting April 7th with the ability to cancel anytime](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=2192.0)
  - [Weekly meetings to review progress and adjust strategy as needed](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Initial focus on audits, strategy development, and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)
  - [Rapid implementation with content publishing expected by week 2 or 3](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=2467.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send updated Statement of Work (SOW) for the April 7th start date](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin preliminary audits and send initial recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
  - [FOSSA team to discuss internally and make a decision on moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=2608.0)
  - [If approved, kick off the collaboration with a focus on audits, strategy, and calibration in the first weeks](https://fathom.video/share/WMs3BiPoj2wrSY2TixtfEek372AVpx_x?tab=summary&timestamp=2647.0)
